div.class: boq_dash_header d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between px-4 py-3 border-bottom

div.p: Enterprise-wide consolidated procurement view across all companies
Trade-wise vendor RFQ summary — Installation & Services
Trade-wise supplier RFQ summary — Supply & Procurement

button.class: boq_cf_clear btn btn-sm btn-link text-muted p-0

div.small: Aggregated across all selected companies · Click a card to view RFQs

div.class: boq_vc_footer d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between flex-wrap gap-1
boq_tree_summary_bar d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 px-4 pb-3

button.title: Click to show/hide recently submitted quotations

span.title: Overall gross margin: (Customer Selling Price − Vendor Cost) / Customer Selling Price × 100

div.small: — Submitted in the last 7 days · Click a row to open
Click a trade row to expand vendors and RFQs

i.class: fa fa-info-circle fa-3x mb-3 d-block text-primary opacity-50

t.small: Open a BOQ, select Work Categories, assign s, then click Create RFQ.

span.title: Trade gross margin: (Customer Selling Price − Vendor Cost) / Customer Selling Price × 100
Gross Margin: (Customer Selling Price − Vendor Cost) / Customer Selling Price × 100
Submitted in last 7 days — review needed
Gross Margin: (Customer Selling Price − Vendor Cost) / Customer Selling Price × 100
